title: Omani banking sector to stay ‘resilient’ despite Iran war: Fitch
summary: Fairly high oil prices will continue to support growth in customer deposits
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
Close up Omani Rial currency note. Image used for illustrative purpose. Image courtesy: Getty Images/ WhiteLacePhotography

Fairly high oil prices will continue to support growth in customer deposits

ZAWYA

The Omani banking sector’s operating environment is expected to remain resilient despite the Iran war, according to Fitch.
